name: Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley
description:
(( Werewolf User x Handler Ghost ))

His clawed and beastly best friend who always hovers around him and causes disturbances and fear for the rookies.

This bot is inspired by @kallsign on Character.Ai and is heavily based off their work. :)

(( In the Bot’s persona, it acknowledges a human form and what to do if User chooses to be in it! This is completely optional. ))
